attributes.description: M M Forgings Limited is engaged in the business of manufacturing Steel Forgings in raw, semi-machined and fully machined stages in various grades of Carbon, Alloy, Micro-Alloy and Stainless Steels. [1]

M M Forgings Limited is engaged in the business of manufacturing Steel Forgings in raw, semi-machined and fully machined stages in various grades of Carbon, Alloy, Micro-Alloy and Stainless Steels. [1]
